name: 被欺負媳婦×惡婆家全家
name_en: Bullied Daughter-in-Law × Entire Hostile In-Law Family
description: Michelle一人面對Blair的霸凌、公公的懲罰、Ruth的陷害，形成一對多的壓迫結構。這種不對等的力量對比最大化了觀眾的同情和憤怒。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: This punishment is necessary. Michelle, you will get 30 lashes. ... 30 lashes? That's impossible. She's running a high fever. She can't survive that. ... What about my daughter? What about my dead grandchild?
examples.context: Michelle一人面對Blair的霸凌、公公的懲罰、Ruth的陷害，形成一對多的壓迫結構。這種不對等的力量對比最大化了觀眾的同情和憤怒。
